description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including a dense perimeter of trees and a row of tall, manicured shrubs at the front. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of light and dark exterior wall finishes, likely concrete or stucco with wood or composite accents. The front yard includes a paved driveway and a small patch of grass, while the backyard is more private, with a wooden deck and a pool area partially visible. The house has multiple outdoor living spaces, including a rooftop terrace and a ground-level patio shaded by trees. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. The entryway is understated, with a simple door and minimal ornamentation, blending seamlessly into the modern facade.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of light and dark finishes, surrounded by dense trees and manicured landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, row of tall shrubs, driveway, and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace and pool area.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the flat roof, upper terrace, and the dense tree coverage at the back of the property.
description_view_2: Back view dominated by the thick tree line, with the rear facade and outdoor deck partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear/side view showing the wooden deck, purple-leaved tree, and the integration of the house with the surrounding greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, no porch, and a row of tall shrubs providing privacy
